metrics.note: Pickup modal opened and rendered with map + location list. 13.6s measurement includes Playwright overhead between mark/evaluate calls. Actual modal render was visually fast (<1s perceived).
Modal shows multiple locations with map clustering (clusters of 2 and 31 visible). List scrollable with 7+ locations.
Map uses marker clustering for high-density areas. Cluster markers show counts (2, 31). Performance acceptable with clustering strategy.

testResults.title: Search Response Time
testResults.notes: Search response time 568ms slightly exceeds 500ms threshold. Debouncing is effective (only 1 API call for typed query). Results are comprehensive.

metrics.note: Category page filters (Show in stock chip) applied. Filter UI responds quickly. GraphQL calls for filter operations averaged 468ms.
Google Maps interactive component renders and responds to user interaction. Map tiles load properly. Cannot measure exact FPS in automation context but no visual jank observed.
Map zoom and tile loading work correctly. Clustering adjusts on zoom level changes.
Map markers are clickable. Location list on the left side provides click-to-select interaction.

testResults.title: Memory Leak Detection
testResults.notes: Memory decreased after multiple navigations, indicating effective garbage collection. No memory leak detected.

metrics.note: Extended session with search, modal open/close, navigation across pages shows stable memory (39-52MB range). No unbounded growth observed.
Debouncing prevents excess API calls during search. GraphQL calls are batched appropriately.

testResults.title: CSS Animation Performance
testResults.notes: Animations use CSS transforms and will-change for GPU acceleration. Proper compositing strategy.

testResults.title: Paint/Layout Metrics

metrics.note: 16 long tasks detected during 5000px scroll. Max task 194ms. Some may be automation overhead, but 194ms is notable.

testResults.notes: Long tasks during scroll suggest potential for jank. The 194ms task exceeds the 50ms long task threshold by 4x. Most tasks in 50-87ms range.

testResults.title: Page Load - Category
testResults.notes: Category page has excellent Core Web Vitals. LCP 896ms (well under 2.5s), FCP 572ms (under 1.5s), CLS 0.038 (under 0.1). Minor layout shifts from footer and header element repositioning.

testResults.title: Page Load - Product
testResults.notes: Product page LCP and FCP are good. CLS 0.1051 marginally exceeds the 0.1 threshold (NEEDS_IMPROVEMENT). Image lazy loading properly implemented (27/34 images). The CLS issue likely comes from dynamic content loading shifting the layout.

testResults.title: Page Load - Cart
testResults.notes: Cart page LCP 3240ms exceeds 2.5s threshold (NEEDS_IMPROVEMENT). LCP element is likely a 'Recently browsed' product image loading late. TTFB=1ms indicates SPA client-side navigation. CLS is good at 0.0875.
consoleErrors: Failed to load resource: BrownJeans_md.png returned 404 from cms-content

testResults.title: API Response Times
testResults.notes: 5 out of 14 GraphQL API calls exceeded the 500ms threshold. Maximum response time 1194ms. Average 468ms is borderline. The slowest calls (1194ms, 1000ms, 892ms) are likely complex queries with multiple joins.

testResults.title: Scroll Performance - Long Lists

metrics.note: 16 long tasks detected during catalog page scroll. Automation context may inflate counts but 194ms max task indicates real jank potential.

testResults.notes: Scroll performance shows 16 long tasks (>50ms) during 5000px scroll on catalog page. Max task 194ms. Note: Playwright automation adds overhead to long task counts, so real-world performance is likely better. Recommend verifying with manual testing using Chrome DevTools.

bugs.title: Cart page LCP exceeds 2.5s threshold (3240ms)
bugs.details: Cart page Largest Contentful Paint is 3240ms, exceeding the 2.5s 'Good' threshold. The LCP element appears to be a product image in the 'Recently browsed' section. This is a client-side rendered page (TTFB=1ms SPA navigation).
bugs.recommendation: Consider preloading critical images, implementing skeleton screens for the recently-browsed section, or deferring non-critical sections below the fold.

bugs.title: GraphQL API responses exceeding 500ms threshold
bugs.details: 5 out of 14 GraphQL API calls exceeded 500ms. Maximum response time was 1194ms. Average response time 468ms.
bugs.recommendation: Profile slow GraphQL queries server-side. Consider query optimization, field selection reduction, or caching strategies for frequently-accessed data.

bugs.title: Product page CLS marginally exceeds 0.1 threshold
bugs.details: Product page CLS measured at 0.1051, just above the 0.1 'Good' threshold. Layout shifts come from dynamic content loading.
bugs.recommendation: Reserve space for dynamic content (product images, properties, recommendations) with explicit dimensions or skeleton placeholders.

bugs.title: Google Maps deprecated API usage (46 warnings)
bugs.details: Pickup modal map generates 46 deprecation warnings: '<gmp-pin>: The glyph property is deprecated. Please use glyphSrc or glyphText instead.' from Google Maps API v3.
bugs.recommendation: Update Google Maps marker implementation to use glyphSrc/glyphText instead of deprecated glyph property.

bugs.title: Missing product image - BrownJeans_md.png (404)
bugs.details: Cart page 'Recently browsed' section attempts to load BrownJeans_md.png from cms-content which returns 404.

consoleErrorSummary.details: 46 Google Maps glyph deprecation warnings. 1 resource 404 (BrownJeans_md.png).
